{% extends 'layouts/admin_base.html' %} {% from "components/page_header.html" import page_header %} {% from "components/card.html" import card, card_header, card_description, card_content %} {% from "components/data_card.html" import data_card %} {% from "components/status_badge.html" import status_badge %} {% from "components/document_analyzer.html" import document_analyzer_upload %} {% set product_count = vendor.products|length if vendor.products else 0 %} {% set capability_count = vendor_capabilities|length if vendor_capabilities else 0 %} {% set deployed_count = deployed_applications|length if deployed_applications else 0 %} {% set archimate_count = archimate_elements|length if archimate_elements else 0 %} {% set contract_status = vendor.contract_status or 'catalog' %} {% set contract_variant_map = {'deployed': 'success', 'contracted': 'primary', 'inactive': 'error', 'catalog': 'neutral'} %} {% set operational_variant_map = {'active': 'success', 'restricted': 'warning', 'deprecated': 'error'} %} {% set market_position = vendor.gartner_magic_quadrant_position or vendor.partnership_level or 'Not Classified' %} {% if vendor.employee_count %} {% if vendor.employee_count >= 100000 %} {% set company_size = 'Enterprise' %} {% elif vendor.employee_count >= 10000 %} {% set company_size = 'Large Market' %} {% elif vendor.employee_count >= 1000 %} {% set company_size = 'Mid-Market' %} {% else %} {% set company_size = 'Small Business' %} {% endif %} {% else %} {% set company_size = 'Not Specified' %} {% endif %} {% block content %}
{{ page_header( title=vendor.name, description=vendor.description or 'Vendor lifecycle, product portfolio, and architecture relationships.', breadcrumbs=[ {'label': 'Dashboard', 'href': url_for('main.index')}, {'label': 'Vendor Catalogue', 'href': url_for('unified_applications.vendors')}, {'label': vendor.name} ] ) }}
Back {% if vendor.website %} Visit Website {% endif %} Edit Vendor Ask AI {% if contract_status == 'catalog' %} Activate Vendor {% endif %}
{{ data_card(icon='package', icon_color='blue', value=product_count, label='Products', subtitle='In this vendor portfolio') }} {{ data_card(icon='shield-check', icon_color='green', value=capability_count, label='Capability Mappings', subtitle='Mapped business capabilities') }} {{ data_card(icon='network', icon_color='purple', value=deployed_count, label='Deployed Applications', subtitle='Linked application components') }} {{ data_card(icon='blocks', icon_color='amber', value=archimate_count, label='ArchiMate Elements', subtitle='Architecture elements linked') }}
{# FRAG-036: Vendor Score Card (lazy-loaded) #}
{% call card() %} {% call card_header() %}

Vendor Score

{% call card_description() %}MCDA scores across 5 dimensions{% endcall %} {% endcall %} {% call card_content() %}
Loading…
{% endcall %} {% endcall %}
{% call card(class="lg:col-span-2 vendor-info") %} {% call card_header() %}

Vendor Profile

{% call card_description() %}Operational metadata and market context for this vendor.{% endcall %} {% endcall %} {% call card_content() %}
Operational Status
{{ status_badge(text=(vendor.status or 'unknown')|replace('_', ' ')|title, variant=operational_variant_map.get(vendor.status, 'neutral')) }}
Contract Status
{{ status_badge(text=contract_status|replace('_', ' ')|title, variant=contract_variant_map.get(contract_status, 'neutral')) }}
Vendor Type
{{ (vendor.vendor_type or 'Uncategorized') | replace('_', ' ') | title }}
Market Position
{{ market_position | replace('_', ' ') | title }}
Company Size
{{ company_size }}
Headquarters
{% if vendor.headquarters_location %} {{ vendor.headquarters_location }} {% else %} Not specified {% endif %}
Website
{% if vendor.website %} {{ vendor.website }} {% else %} Not provided {% endif %}
Enterprise Readiness
{% set readiness = vendor.enterprise_readiness_score or 0 %}
{{ readiness }}%
{% endcall %} {% endcall %}
{% call card(class="h-fit") %} {% call card_header() %}

Contract Lifecycle

{% call card_description() %}Activation and contract management controls.{% endcall %} {% endcall %} {% call card_content() %}
Current Status {{ status_badge(text=contract_status|replace('_', ' ')|title, variant=contract_variant_map[contract_status]|default('neutral')) }}
Start Date {{ vendor.contract_start_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') if vendor.contract_start_date else '-' }}
End Date {{ vendor.contract_end_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') if vendor.contract_end_date else '-' }}
Annual Contract Value {% if vendor.contract_value_annual %} ${{ "{:,.0f}".format(vendor.contract_value_annual|float) }} {% else %} - {% endif %}
{% if contract_status == 'catalog' %}

Activate Vendor

{% endif %} {% endcall %} {% endcall %}
{% call card(class="mb-6") %} {% call card_header() %}

Products & Deployment

{% call card_description() %}Product portfolio with lifecycle and deployment metadata.{% endcall %} {% endcall %} {% call card_content() %} {% if vendor.products %}
{% for product in vendor.products %}

{{ product.name }}

{% if not product.updated_at %} Stale Data {% elif stale_product_ids is defined and product.id in stale_product_ids %} Stale Data {% endif %}

{{ product.description or 'No product description available.' }}

{{ status_badge(text=(product.status or 'active')|replace('_', ' ')|title, variant='success' if (product.status or 'active') == 'active' else 'neutral') }}
Lifecycle
{{ product.product_maturity or (product.lifecycle_status if product.lifecycle_status is defined else None) or '-' }}
Type
{{ product.product_type or '-' }}
Deployment Model
{{ product.deployment_model or '-' }}
Target Market
{{ product.target_market or '-' }}
{% endfor %}
{% else %}

No products listed

{% endif %} {% endcall %} {% endcall %}
{{ document_analyzer_upload('vendor', vendor.id, vendor.name) }}

Process Code Process Name Product Coverage Relevance Level
{{ process.process_code or '-' }} {{ process.process_name or '-' }} {{ product.name }} {{ mapping.coverage_percentage or 0 }}% {{ mapping.relevance_score or 0 }} {{ (mapping.coverage_level or 'partial')|replace('_',' ')|title }}
{% else %}

{% endif %} {% endcall %} {% endcall %} {% call card() %} {% call card_header() %}

ArchiMate 3.2 Layer View

{% call card_description() %}Elements organized by architecture layer for vendor traceability.{% endcall %} {% endcall %} {% call card_content() %}
Strategy ({{ elements_by_layer.strategy|length }}) Motivation ({{ elements_by_layer.motivation|length }}) Business ({{ elements_by_layer.business|length }}) Application ({{ elements_by_layer.application|length }}) Technology ({{ elements_by_layer.technology|length }})
{% for layer_name, elements in [ ('strategy', elements_by_layer.strategy), ('motivation', elements_by_layer.motivation), ('business', elements_by_layer.business), ('application', elements_by_layer.application), ('technology', elements_by_layer.technology) ] %}
